name: setup: launch medit with clean state and wait for window
comment: Verified live against medit 1.5.0: the editor (editorTextView), sidebar (sidebarOutline), and status label (positionLabel) DO surface their AXIdentifiers, so plans target by identifier. Menu items, however, expose NO value/mark-char in AX, so menu-toggle plans assert observable side effects (status-bar title, AXOutline presence) instead of the checkmark. --reset-state was strengthened (App/main.swift + LaunchReset.swift) to clear sidebar bookmarks, disable window restoration, and delete autosaved untitled docs, so this yields a truly empty editor at Ln 1, Col 1 with no sidebar roots.
